decisions.rationale: Valid ir-fidelity documentation gap: decompose scope and buildBehavioralFingerprint.ts header cite pointer name bTICa while Bubble entity id and ir_refs are bTICV (event_name calculate_behavioral_fingerprint). Implementation and buildBehavioralFingerprint.test.ts use correct bTICV branch strings; criteria_audit AC-1 and functional_audit FV-1 pass. Standardizing comments/decompose prose to bTICV is cycle-artifact housekeeping — does not affect runtime behavior or API-05-ai-coaching-mode-assignment depends_on gate, which needs a computed behavioral_fingerprint_text string, not grep-friendly entity ids.

Valid testing gap: resolveBehavioralFingerprint has exhaustive 14-case unit coverage but calculateUserBehavioralFingerprint lacks mocked loadProfileRow/patchOnboardingAndResults integration test. Testing is not in API-04 acceptance criteria; review priority is low. Core branch logic is verified; field extraction (behavioralPatterns.pressure_response_pattern, non_followthrough_reason) and patch payload are thin wrappers over tested resolveBehavioralFingerprint and shared profileFieldPatch. API-05 calculateUserAiCoachingMode already reads onboarding_data[behavioral_fingerprint_text] after pipeline invocation — depends_on gate is satisfiable without calculator integration tests. Add calculateUserBehavioralFingerprint.test.ts in a dedicated test wave.

Critique correctly notes Bubble bTIDk ChangeThing writes user.behavioral_fingerprint_text while prototype stores behavioral_fingerprint_text in profiles.onboarding_data via patchOnboardingAndResults — but this is intentional brownfield adaptation, not a defect. Decompose scope explicitly limits work to frontend Supabase client patch with no project/ schema changes; sibling calculators API-02/API-03 use the same onboarding_data pattern for classification_option_classification_os and pressure_profile_text. calculateUserAiCoachingMode (API-05) already consumes onboarding_data[BEHAVIORAL_FINGERPRINT_TEXT_FIELD] after runOnboardingProfilePipeline invokes calculateUserBehavioralFingerprint — downstream depends_on gate is fully satisfiable. Dedicated profiles-column migration is out of scope until backend schema work is explicitly scheduled.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, all ACs pass, no blockers. Deferred: C-1 bTICa→bTICV comment/decompose standardization (cycle-artifact housekeeping); C-2 calculateUserBehavioralFingerprint integration tests (out of AC scope, dedicated test wave). Accepted: C-3 onboarding_data vs user-column storage (intentional prototype pattern per decompose scope; API-05-ai-coaching-mode-assignment consumes fingerprint from onboarding_data successfully).
